mapper.select: SELECT id, link_id, ip_hash, amount, created_at FROM payments WHERE link_id = #{linkId} AND ip_hash = #{ipHash} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payments (id, link_id, ip_hash, amount) VALUES (#{id}, #{linkId}, #{ipHash}, #{amount})
mapper.select: SELECT id, link_id, ip_hash, amount, created_at FROM payments WHERE link_id = #{linkId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
